properties.name: spring.boot.admin.hazelcast.event-store
properties.description: Name of backing Hazelcast-Map for storing the instance events.

properties.name: spring.boot.admin.hazelcast.sent-notifications
properties.description: Name of backing Hazelcast-Map for storing the sent notifications.

properties.name: spring.boot.admin.hazelcast.response-cache
properties.description: Name of the Hazelcast IMap used as the shared actuator response cache across cluster nodes.

properties.name: spring.boot.admin.endpoint-cache.enabled
properties.description: Enable server-side caching of proxied actuator endpoint GET responses.

properties.name: spring.boot.admin.endpoint-cache.default-ttl
properties.description: Default time-to-live for cached actuator responses.

properties.name: spring.boot.admin.endpoint-cache.ttl
properties.description: Per-endpoint-id TTL overrides. Keys are actuator endpoint ids (e.g. 'mappings'). Defaults to endpoint-cache.default-ttl.

properties.name: spring.boot.admin.endpoint-cache.endpoints
properties.description: Actuator endpoint ids whose GET responses will be cached. Defaults to a conservative set of expensive, mostly-static endpoints.

properties.name: spring.boot.admin.endpoint-cache.max-payload-size
properties.description: Maximum response body size in bytes that will be stored in the cache. Larger responses are forwarded as-is.
